description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a Northern Cardinal, featuring a vibrant red plumage that covers most of its body. The bird has a distinctive black mask around its beak and eyes, which contrasts sharply with the bright red feathers. Its beak is short, thick, and conical, colored in a muted orange or reddish hue. The wings and tail feathers are slightly darker, with subtle brownish tones and a somewhat pointed, elongated tail. The legs are slender and appear dark, blending with the underbelly. The overall texture of the feathers is soft and matte, with a naturalistic arrangement and slight variations in color across the body.
description: A vivid red Northern Cardinal with a black facial mask, conical beak, and pointed tail, featuring soft, matte feathers and subtle brownish wing tones.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the bright red plumage, black facial mask, and conical beak, with the tail and wings visible in profile.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view showing the elongated, pointed tail and the gradient from red to brown on the wings and tail feathers.
description_view_2: Back view emphasizing the full length of the tail and the subtle brownish tones on the wings and back.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view focusing on the head, beak, and facial mask, with the body tapering towards the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid red body with a black facial mask and subtle brownish gradients on wings and tail
